rules.name: Tax
rules.explanation: Each portion of income taxed at its bracket rate.

howItWorks.outro: Tax laws and financial markets change frequently. Verify current rates with your financial institution.

faq.a: The rate applied to your last dollar of income.
Effective rate is always lower since earlier income is taxed at lower rates.

howWeCalculate.intro: This tax bracket calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
